CustomField.description: The donation amount used to create installment Opportunities. For Open recurring donations, this is the per-installment amount. For Fixed with Multiply By schedule, this is also the per-installment amount. For Fixed with Divide By schedule, this is the total amount divided across installments.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The amount for each donation installment. How this value is applied depends on the Recurring Type and Schedule Type settings.
CustomField.label: Amount
